title: Supply Recap 2025 - The Silent Hand
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2025-12-17_supply-recap-2025-the-silent-hand_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_c365f35f1de5.png
As we wind down an eventful 2025, and set aside geopolitics and trade tariffs, it is an opportune moment to recap how dry bulk supply fundamentals have evolved. From uneven congestion and reduced fleet speeds to an uncertain orderbook landscape, muted demolition and regulatory shifts, the dynamics (both striking and subtle) shaping transportation capacity have seldom been as varied or as interconnected as they are today. Laden Fleet Speed
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-12-17 120107.png | assets/2025-12-17_supply-recap-2025-the-silent-hand_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_a1ce22053c98.png
Stricter environmental rules continue to incentivize slower speeds as a means of reducing greenhouse gas emissions.
